meta.title: Chaltén Loft — Apartments in El Chaltén, Patagonia
meta.description: Three fully equipped lofts steps from Fitz Roy and Cerro Torre. Book direct — best price guaranteed.

home.heroTagline: Where the mountains begin at your door.
home.heroSubtitle: Three fully equipped lofts in El Chaltén — steps from Fitz Roy and Cerro Torre.
home.reason2Desc: Direct contact with Gabriel, who lives in El Chaltén.
home.reason3Desc: Custom check-in/out, local tips, luggage storage.
home.chaltenP1: The trails begin at the edge of town. No shuttle buses, no entrance gates. You walk out of the loft and in twenty minutes you are in the forest.
home.chaltenP2: Fitz Roy and Cerro Torre are not a day trip — they are your neighbours. The light changes four times before breakfast and the wind has a personality you will learn to respect.
home.chaltenP3: Our lofts are three blocks from the Fitz Roy trailhead and four from the town centre. Everything in El Chaltén is close. What matters at the end of the day is a warm bed and hot water that does not run out.
home.nightsSelected: {count, plural, one {# night selected} other {# nights selected}}

property.propertiesSubtitle: Three fully equipped lofts in the heart of El Chaltén. Each one designed for people who came to move.
property.propertyDesc: A {sqm}m² designer loft in the center of El Chaltén. Fully equipped kitchen, comfortable bed, mountain views. Three blocks from the trailhead.
property.detailDesc1: Your space in El Chaltén — a modern corner surrounded by nature, a bright oasis in the center of town. A perfect blend of warmth and modernity, this {sqm}m² designer loft is ideal for disconnecting, resting and waking up to mountain views.
property.detailDesc2: Three blocks from the Fitz Roy trailhead. Four from the town centre. Everything you need after a day on the trail: a real kitchen, a comfortable bed, and hot water that does not run out.

about.heroTitle:
Where the mountains
begin at your door.
about.heroSubtitle: We came to El Chaltén and somewhere between the first hike and the first night of wind, we realized we did not want to leave.
about.storyP1: The lofts exist because we wanted guests to have what we would want as travellers ourselves. After six hours on the trail, you do not want a hotel lobby. You want a hot shower, a real kitchen, and a window that faces something that matters.
about.storyP2: Each loft is fully equipped — not a studio with a microwave, but an actual kitchen where you can cook a proper meal. A washer because after four days of trekking your clothes need it. A bed that is genuinely comfortable, not just acceptable.
about.storyP3: We live in El Chaltén. When you book direct, you are not talking to a call centre — you are talking to someone who walked the same trails yesterday and knows which one to do first based on today's weather.
about.hostDesc: Response rate 97%. Usually responds within one hour. Speaks Spanish, English, and enough trail vocabulary in six other languages to point you in the right direction.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heroSubtitle: We respond in Spanish, English, and usually within an hour. Ask us anything about the lofts, the trails, or El Chaltén.
contact.luggageDesc: Arriving early or leaving late? We have a secure locker where you can leave your bags before check-in or after check-out — free of charge.
